label: Task 1 — Add column (easy)
actions: SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = 'customers';
ALTER TABLE customers ADD COLUMN loyalty_tier VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'standard' NOT NULL;
ALTER TABLE customers ADD CONSTRAINT chk_loyalty_tier CHECK (loyalty_tier IN ('standard', 'silver', 'gold', 'platinum'));

label: Task 2 — Table split (medium)
actions: SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = 'products';

CREATE TABLE product_pricing (product_id SMALLINT PRIMARY KEY, unit_price REAL, units_in_stock SMALLINT, units_on_order SMALLINT, reorder_level SMALLINT, discontinued INTEGER, CONSTRAINT fk_pp_product FOREIGN KEY (product_id) REFERENCES products(product_id))
INSERT INTO product_pricing SELECT product_id, unit_price, units_in_stock, units_on_order, reorder_level, discontinued FROM products
ALTER TABLE products DROP COLUMN unit_price
ALTER TABLE products DROP COLUMN units_in_stock
ALTER TABLE products DROP COLUMN units_on_order
ALTER TABLE products DROP COLUMN reorder_level

label: Task 3 — Multi-table migration (hard) ⚠
actions: SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = 'orders';
ALTER TABLE orders ADD COLUMN order_status VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending';
UPDATE orders SET order_status = CASE WHEN shipped_date IS NULL THEN 'pending' ELSE 'shipped' END;
ALTER TABLE orders ADD CONSTRAINT chk_order_status CHECK (order_status IN ('pending', 'shipped', 'cancelled'));
CREATE INDEX idx_orders_customer_date ON orders(customer_id, order_date);
CREATE TABLE audit_log (log_id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, table_name VARCHAR(50), operation VARCHAR(20), performed_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(), note TEXT);
INSERT INTO audit_log (table_name, operation, note) VALUES ('orders', 'MIGRATION', 'Added order_status column, status index, and audit_log');
